title: The 3-symmetric Pseudolinear Crossing Number of $K_{33}$
author_string: Víctor H. Gómez Martínez, César Hernández-Vélez, Jesús Leaños
abstract: We show that the 3-symmetric rectilinear and the 3-symmetric pseudolinear crossing numbers of $K_{33}$ are equal. Specifically, we prove that $\operatorname{sym}-\overline{\operatorname{cr}}_3(K_{33}) = 14 634 = \operatorname{sym}-\widetilde{\operatorname{cr}}_3(K_{33})$.
